message:
fix(deps): update github.com/yuin/goldmark to v1.8.2

Minor version bump. Supersedes Renovate PR #2789 which had unrelated
test failures from a stale branch.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
